title: Question: it is any possible to make verilator case-insensitive ?
body:
---


Author Name: **Jacob Liang**
Original Redmine Message: 3187 from https://www.veripool.org



---

For some reason,I use the uppercase letters as module name,like ABC,but its file named abc.v.
But it seems that verilator is case-sensitive,so it can not find the module,unless including abc.v
it is any possible to make verilator case insensitive?
